title: Compliance — Diversity and EEO
content:
Morgan State University aims to maintain an academic and working environment in which students, faculty, and staff feel safe and are free to develop intellectually, professionally, personally, and socially. The university maintains a Nondiscrimination Policy (referenced as Attachment A) and a Sexual Harassment and Prohibited Conduct Policy (Attachment B) that govern responses to discriminatory practices and workplace misconduct. The ORA Diversity and EEO compliance page links to a set of institutional documents: MSU Diversity and EEO FAQs, the Nondiscrimination Policy, the Sexual Harassment and Prohibited Conduct Policy, Prohibited Conduct Procedures (Employee Respondents), the Annual Cultural Diversity Plan (2022), the Transformation Morgan 2030 Strategic Plan, Cultural Diversity Data (AY 2010 to present), and the Public Notice of Title VI Program Rights (2024). The university complies with Title VI of the federal civil-rights framework. Title IX information is maintained on the dedicated Title IX page; ADA and accessibility information is available through the main university website. General research-related EEO inquiries can be routed to the Office of Research Administration at ask.ora@morgan.edu or 443-885-4044 (Tyler Hall, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251).

Verbatim Statement from the Diversity & EEO page: Morgan State University aims to maintain an academic and working environment in which students, faculty, and staff feel safe and are free to develop intellectually, professionally, personally, and socially. Acts of discrimination and lack of inclusivity subvert the University's mission to grow globally, threaten the wellbeing of the University community, and interfere with academic and employment growth. The University has in place intentional steps to attract a more diverse community and to develop a sense of belonging. The University has a multi-faceted approach for fair and improved inclusion of underserved students, staff, and faculty. All policies that facilitate Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion plus a statement on how Morgan State University upholds these policies and the extent to which these policies are incorporated into the University's programming are available below.

Attachments listed on the page: Attachment A (Nondiscrimination Policy); Attachment B (Sexual Harassment and Prohibited Conduct Policy); Attachment C (Prohibited Conduct Procedures Under the University's Sexual Harassment and Prohibited Conduct Policy - Respondent is an Employee); Attachment D (Annual Cultural Diversity Plan 2022); Attachment E (Transformation Morgan 2030); Attachment F (Annual Cultural Diversity Plan 2022); Attachment G (Cultural Diversity from AY 2010 to Present); plus Public Notice of Title VI Program Rights.

primary_policies: Sexual Harassment and Prohibited Conduct Policy
